description.ko: 단일 백색광 줄기가 유리 프리즘을 통해 생동감 넘치는 무지개 빛깔로 변하는 빛의 물리학적 순간을 포착한 탐구입니다.
description.en: An exploration of the physics of light, capturing the moment a single beam of white light transforms into a vibrant spectrum of colors through a glass prism.

prompt: A high-resolution macro shot of a triangular glass prism on a minimalist dark surface. A sharp, concentrated beam of white light enters from the left, undergoing internal refraction before exiting as a wide, vivid spectrum of spectral colors. Cinematic lighting, hyper-realistic texture, 8k resolution, caustic light patterns, sharp focus on the dispersion effect within the glass.
